title: On A Noted Coxcomb.
content:
Light lay the earth on Willy's breast,
            His chicken-heart so tender;
        But build a castle on his head,
            His skull will prop it under.
meaning:
"On A Noted Coxcomb." is a quintessential example of Robert Burns's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
